title: ischaemum indicum var. longipilum
intro: Ischaemum indicum var. longipilum, commonly known as the Long-pilus Ischaemum, is a type of grass found in tropical regions, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The Long-pilus Ischaemum has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
